pr_title: fix: replace two-bullet review_lever prompt with single flowing example
pr_description: Replace the "First sentence… / Second sentence…" decomposition in `review_lever` field description and system prompt with a single flowing example Weaker models (llama3.1) interpret the two-bullet format as two *alternative* formats rather than one required format, causing call-1 validation failures The new example ("This lever governs the tension between centralization and local autonomy, but the options overlook transition costs.") is a single natural block that models can imitate directly
